---
title: "Demo for 'mcstprules::basic_rules'"
---

This demo runs the code from `demo("basic_rules", package = "mcstprules")` in R. 

```{r demo_execution, code = readLines(system.file("demo", "basic_rules.R", package = "mcstprules")), fig.alt = "Network graphs for Bird, Folk, Kar, and Public rules, and a bar chart comparing some cost allocations."}
```

---

You can also [download the raw R script here](https://github.com/luciasouto13/mcstprules/blob/master/demo/basic_rules.R) to run it locally on your computer.
